name: Beefy Spanish Rice
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Can whole tomatoes, undrained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the chopped green pepper and celery in hot oil until tender.
2. Drain the tomatoes, reserving the liquid. Add enough water to the tomato liquid to measure 1 cup.
3. Add the tomatoes, tomato liquid, tomato sauce, rice, bay leaf, and red pepper to the beef mixture, stirring well.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil; then cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Dissolve the bouillon granules in boiling water; add to the rice mixture.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
7. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes.
8. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
